mapper.select: SELECT ac.id, ac.cc_user_id AS ccUserId, ac.cc_user_name AS ccUserName, CASE WHEN ac.is_read = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isRead, ac.read_time AS readTime, ac.create_time AS createTime FROM oa_approval_cc ac WHERE ac.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY ac.create_time ASC

SELECT ac.id, ac.cc_user_id AS ccUserId, ac.cc_user_name AS ccUserName, CASE WHEN ac.is_read = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isRead, ac.read_time AS readTime, ac.create_time AS createTime, ar.record_no AS recordNo, ar.business_type AS businessType, ar.title FROM oa_approval_cc ac INNER JOIN oa_approval_record ar ON ac.record_id = ar.id WHERE ac.cc_user_id = #{userId} AND ac.is_read = #{isRead} ORDER BY ac.create_time DESC
